attributes.action: Fix the potholes on uk roads to a higher standard or decrease/stop road tax
attributes.additional_details: The roads in uk are getting worse the road tax is rising yet we dont get to see why we pay more recently every where you drive you have to swerve and avoid car killer pot holes including on motorways it is going to end up causing deaths due to all cars swerving these all over social media groups are people warning eachother of pot holes something needs to be done wether road tax stops or roads repaired and to a higher standard
attributes.background: Fix the pot holes more promptly and to a higher quality to prevent coming back after a few weeks or decrease/stop anual road tax due to roads not safe for vehicles and incuring more cost for road user due to needing to repairs and recovery

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fix Our Roads: National Plan on Dangerous Potholes Now
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/739014
